description_long: This is a three-seat sofa with a robust, rectangular wooden frame and a dark, rich wood grain finish. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and slightly indented, suggesting a soft, comfortable seating experience. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, modern silhouette. The legs are short, blocky, and positioned at the corners and center for added support, all made from the same wood as the frame. The upholstery has a subtle, linear wood grain pattern that matches the frame, creating a cohesive and natural look. There are no visible decorative elements or contrasting materials, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design.
description: A modern, three-seat wooden sofa with straight armrests, block legs, and matching wood grain cushions for a cohesive, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three individual seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the block legs beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with clear visibility of the sofa's rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, loose seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a solid wood appearance and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, block-style wooden legs positioned at the four corners and two central points for support, all exposed and matching the frame's wood grain.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle linear wood grain pattern on both the frame and cushions, with a smooth, matte texture and no additional decorative stitching or detailing.
